args.ArtifactMetadata: {"ArtifactType":"other","RequestFeedback":false,"Summary":"Python script to extract first read of SettingsPortal.tsx from previous log to reconstruct original uncorrupted file."}
args.CodeContent:
"import json

log_path = "/Users/paulpolsulintaboon/.gemini/antigravity/brain/59119761-b490-421b-b15d-46f12f5c4158/.system_generated/logs/transcript.jsonl"

with open(log_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    for idx, line in enumerate(f):
        if idx == 877:
            data = json.loads(line)
            content = data.get('content', '')
            print(f"Index 877 content length: {len(content)}")
            print("First 500 chars:")
            print(content[:500])
            print("Last 500 chars:")
            print(content[-500:])
            # Save it to a file
            with open("SettingsPortal.tsx.extracted", "w", encoding="utf-8") as out:
                out.write(content)
            print("Saved to SettingsPortal.tsx.extracted")
            break
"
args.Description: "Write python script to extract the first view of SettingsPortal from logs"
